description: Converts a conversation message array into a readable text transcript. Useful for logging, display, or feeding to models expecting plain text.

inputs.name: messages
inputs.description: The conversation message array to convert

inputs.name: include_system
inputs.description: Whether to include system messages in the output

outputs.name: text
outputs.description: The conversation as a text transcript

outputs.name: message_count
outputs.description: Number of messages included in the output
